bullets.text: Iran's military conflict with the US has escalated, resulting in 16 US service member deaths

markets.headline: Index forecast rising; Brent +0.4%; gold +0.2%; VIX +0.4% (model estimate).
markets.method_note: Threat beta = OLS of daily log-returns on the index change at the lead lag; launch-day estimates lean on BNTI-seeded history. Association, not causation.
